problems.description: CampusHub transforms your archaic processes into smooth, automated experiences.

list.after: Zero conflict guaranteed by our algorithm

features.title: Everything for your institution
features.description: A complete suite of tools designed to simplify the lives of students, teachers, and administrators.

list.title: Smart Planning
list.description: Automated algorithm that eliminates schedule conflicts and optimizes room usage.

list.title: Course Management
list.description: Centralized pedagogical materials with an integrated and intuitive validation workflow.

list.title: Real-time Notifications
list.description: Instant alerts for schedule changes, new materials, and exams.

list.title: Analytics & Reports
list.description: Detailed dashboards to track attendance and resource occupancy.

list.title: Maximum Security
list.description: Protection of academic data with high-level encryption standards.

list.title: Mobile Experience
list.description: Access CampusHub everywhere with an interface optimized for all your devices.

roles_section.title: A tailored experience
roles_section.description: CampusHub adapts to each user with interfaces optimized for their specific needs.

list.title: Students
list.description: Access your course materials, view your schedules and receive your exam alerts.

list.title: Teachers
list.description: Upload your courses, manage your availability and track your material validations.

list.title: Pedagogical Team
list.description: Supervise planning, validate resources and access institution statistics.

list.title: Administrators
list.description: Manage accounts, configure rooms and maintain campus infrastructure.
